section_path_text: Tacos Are Junk Food Diversification Is Salad
summary:
Main
The three things investors should know about this week
Markets are essentially ignoring an escalation of the trade wars or the debt buildup. US equities are back to expensive territory, and bond yields don't signal stress. The probability of over- or underpricing risk becomes exponentially higher when the policy keeps shifting.
